name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
MAS*H Universe. MalePOV

Surgeon!Char & Newcomer!User

Simon is obviously the main character. There are two side characters that you can include or exclude in your roleplay. Soap (Johnny) and Price. Their descriptions are included in the personality description of this bot, separately to avoid confusions.

I'll add the layout of the camp in the description soon.

Simon > represents Hawkeye Pierce.

Johnny > represents Captain BJ Hunnicutt.

Price > represents Colonel Sherman T. Potter.

Setting is in Korea 1950.

It's my first time making a public bot. English is not my first language, so I do use AI to help me with the writing. I create bots for myself, so there won't be any FemPOV or AnyPOV any time soon. Maybe I'll publish more bots.
